creator: ozguratesfirat@yandex.com
text: I need to use USB devices in Turkish language. If I mount drivers from Nautilus I can not see my drive from Nautilus. If mount drivers from Nautilus but ls characters like "Ö, Ü, Ğ, Ş, Ç" shown as ?. If I mount with mount_msdosfs -L tr_TR.UTF-8 /dev/da0s1 /mnt everything works properly.
